text.title: Competitive Positioning Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding Competitive Positioning plus the universal skip/run routing pair (referenced by the decision tree).

rule.statement: The positioning statement MUST name 3-7 real competitive alternatives (including 'do nothing' and 'spreadsheet'); generic phrases like 'legacy solutions' MUST be rejected.
rule.rationale: Vague alternatives produce vague positioning; named alternatives force concrete differentiation choices.

rule.statement: Every claimed unique attribute MUST be one a named alternative cannot truthfully claim; me-too attributes MUST be removed.
rule.rationale: Me-too attributes give buyers no reason to switch; the distinctness test is the gate against shouting into the void.

rule.statement: Each unique-attribute → customer-value translation MUST be quantified (time saved, dollars made, errors avoided) per buyer segment; qualitative-only value MUST be rewritten.
rule.rationale: Qualitative value claims compete on adjective inflation ('faster', 'better'); quantified claims survive procurement review.

rule.statement: The best-fit customer MUST be named with company size, role, trigger event, and budget signal; aspirational personas MUST be rejected.
rule.rationale: Aspirational personas produce GTM messaging nobody self-identifies with; the named best-fit is the channel + targeting input.

rule.statement: The market category MUST be explicit (named or created); category-ambiguous positioning MUST be rejected.
rule.rationale: Without an explicit category, buyers compare against the wrong alternatives and discount accordingly; category framing is the price anchor.

rule.statement: If preconditions in `## Applies If` do not ALL hold OR any disqualifier in `## Skip If` fires, the agent MUST skip this methodology and document the skip reason in the cycle artefact.
rule.rationale: A minimum-form decision tree must route 'preconditions-not-satisfied' to skip; this rule is the canonical target.

rule.statement: If preconditions in `## Applies If` ALL hold AND no disqualifier fires, the agent MUST run the methodology end-to-end and produce the artefact specified in 02-output-contract.xml.
rule.rationale: Pair to skip-this-methodology; together they form the always-present minimal route.
